name: Gensokyo at War RPG (Legacy)
description:
I just turned Touhou into command and conquer 💀💀💀

Aye, lads. This is my very first strategy RPG where you can freely roam and mess around, Create your faction, army and things. AI might get a little quirky from time to time but anyway enjoy wrecking shit up, lads.

Tags: gensokyo, rpg, touhou RPG

——AVAILABLE FACTIONS——

- Tengu Empire | (Lord Tenma)
- Human Village United
- Youkai Trail Tribe | (Mystia Lorelei)
- Kappa Union | (Nitori Kawashiro)
- United Fairies| (Cirno)
- Suzuran Tribe | (Medicine Melancholy)
- Scarlet Empire | (Remilia Scarlet)
- Hakurei Clan | (Reimu Hakurei)
- Moriya Clan | (Kanako Yasaka)
- Doll Master Guild | (Alice Margatroid)
- Myouren Empire | (Byakuren Hijiri)
- Witch Clique | (Marisa Kirisame)
- Chireiden | (Satori Komeiji)
- Brotherhood Of Oni | (Yuugi Hoshiguma)
- Spider Blowhole | (Yamame Kurodani)
- Kasen Hermitage | (Kasen Ibaraki)
- Lunar Kingdom | (Toyohime Watatsuki)

———————————————MAP——————————————————————

NOTE: Heart of Iron 4 at home 🔥 Here's the timeline where Reimu Hakurei weakening in power, so everyone takes the opportunity to just yoink the lands as much as they can and the clusterfuck goes on. Every faction is equally powerful I guess... except the Scarlet Empire, they are still ruining the balance 💀💀
